entry.data:
SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTH AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 80
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON

CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 60
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS AROUND 50
